seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email should include a bulleted list.
new_constraint: Refrain from including bulleted lists in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email should include a bulleted list. Refrain from including bulleted lists in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a great admirer of the work featured at your gallery and have been following your exhibitions with great interest. I am writing to inquire about your schedule of upcoming shows.

I am particularly interested in learning more about:

The dates and themes of any new solo artist features.
Information on any group exhibitions planned for the next few months.
Details regarding any special events or artist talks associated with future shows.

Could you please direct me to your current exhibition calendar or provide me with information regarding what is scheduled to come up?

Thank you very much for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you and hopefully visiting the gallery soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number or Preferred Contact Information]<turn|>
